product_overview: Digital Board is an advanced collaborative whiteboard platform with an infinite canvas, real-time collaboration, rich drawing tools, AI-powered question bank integration, multi-mode user support (Creator, Teacher, Student, Admin), and extensive customization and accessibility features designed to enhance education delivery and content creation.
core_goals: Provide a seamless infinite canvas platform optimized for collaborative teaching and content creation
Enable multi-user real-time collaboration with live cursors, comments, and permission controls
Offer AI-powered question generation, import/export, and content management for educators
Support comprehensive teaching modes including presentation, practice, and assessment with advanced navigation and analytics
Ensure accessibility compliance and mobile responsiveness for inclusive education
Deliver secure, scalable, and extensible architecture ready for enterprise integration and API access
key_features: Infinite zoomable and pannable canvas with drawing, shape, text, sticky notes, and selection tools
Real-time collaboration with live cursors, comments, and multi-level permission sharing
AI-powered question bank creation with advanced filtering, tagging, bilingual support, and versioning
Full-screen presentation mode with navigation controls, timer, annotations, bookmarks, and session recording
Import/export system supporting images, PDFs, JSON, and third-party platform integrations
Advanced analytics dashboard for question usage, session performance, and content quality
Multi-language support including bilingual Hindi-English question creation and display
Comprehensive accessibility features including keyboard navigation, screen reader support, and color contrast modes
Offline capability with local storage synchronization and conflict resolution
Robust security with authentication, role-based access control, audit logging, and data encryption
user_flow_summary: Creator logs in and selects Creator Mode to build or import questions using AI-powered generation or external files
Creator organizes questions with tags, templates, and versioning; creates question sets and exports as needed
Teacher accesses sets via Set ID, configures presentation settings, and conducts full-screen sessions with navigation, bookmarking, annotation, and timer controls
During teaching, Teacher can annotate questions, take notes, and record sessions for later review
Students engage in Practice or Test Modes to self-assess, receive hints, and track progress with AI-driven recommendations
Admins manage users, departments, content approval workflows, and review analytics across the platform
Users collaborate in real-time on boards, sharing feedback with live cursors and comments, maintaining permissions and access controls
validation_criteria: InfiniteCanvas supports smooth zooming (10% to 500%) and pan with responsiveness and virtualization for 1000+ objects
Real-time collaboration via WebSocket with event rate limiting and conflict resolution
AI question creation meets configurable parameters and supports batch generation and bilingual content
Presentation mode buttons and keyboard shortcuts perform expected navigation and reveal actions with smooth animations
Import/export functions handle all supported formats with error handling and preview capability
Accessibility tests confirm keyboard navigation, screen reader compatibility, and contrast compliance
Offline mode supports caching, sync queue management, and conflict resolution without data loss
Security features enforce role-based access, token validation, and encryption standards
Analytics dashboard accurately reflects usage, quality scores, and session data with export options

features.name: Explanation Slide Opacity
features.description: Implemented separate background layer for Explanation Slide to respect global card opacity settings without affecting text visibility. Added cardOpacity support to styles.

features.name: Option Button Opacity
features.description: Linked Option Button background and border styles to the global cardOpacity setting in useBoardStore.

features.name: Compact Explanation Header
features.description: Updated Explanation Slide header to be more compact (smaller padding/font) to maximize content area.

features.name: Explanation Toggle in Toolbar
features.description: Moved the Explanation Slide toggle button from the Question Card to the main BoardToolbar for better accessibility.

features.name: Opacity Settings Control
features.description: Updated StyleToolbar and Types to support cardOpacity and textOpacity configuration.
